subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast suffered persecution and oppression as a servant of the Ancient Beauty! Thou hast endured manifold afflictions at the hands of the oppressors and hast drunk from the cup of tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جفا دیده مظلوم جمال قدم صدمات زیاد از دست ستمکاران خوردی و جام بلا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
